name: PitchBook
description: PitchBook provides private capital markets data; Direct Data delivers that data via an API and bulk datafeeds (SFTP/cloud) for enterprise integrations.

auth_methods.note: PitchBook's Direct Data/product pages mention a 'flexible API' but do not publish technical auth details (OAuth2, API keys, tokens, etc.) on public pages; access/setup is handled via sales/account teams, so public auth method is not documented.

credential_access.note: Direct Data is described as an enterprise-grade product and the page instructs clients to contact their account rep or sales for access; this indicates access is gated and requires a sales/partnership process.

api_surface.note: Product pages state there is a 'flexible API' and bulk Datafeed (SFTP/AWS/Azure) but no public developer reference, REST/GraphQL details, or endpoint documentation is published on pitchbook.com; thus no public API surface to reference.

buildability.note: Because Direct Data is an enterprise product that requires engagement with sales or an account representative to obtain access, you cannot obtain self-serve credentials or public API docs to build against today.

queries: site:pitchbook.com API documentation "API" OR "Datafeed" OR "Direct Data"
PitchBook "Direct Data" API documentation site:pitchbook.com "Direct Data" "API"
COMPOSIO_SEARCH_TAVILY with include_domains ["pitchbook.com"] and query "PitchBook API documentation"
